basics.description:
**XdrLogRaider** — Microsoft Sentinel connector ingesting Defender XDR portal-only telemetry (config / compliance / drift / exposure / governance) via a PowerShell Azure Function App. 52 streams across 7 compliance tiers.

**Prerequisite**: you must already have a Sentinel-enabled Log Analytics workspace. This deployment creates the connector resources (Function App + KV + Storage + DCE + DCR + App Insights) in your chosen RG, and adds 54 custom tables + a Data Connector UI card to your existing workspace (cross-RG supported).

**After deploy**: run `./tools/Initialize-XdrLogRaiderAuth.ps1 -KeyVaultName <from-output>` from the cloned repo to upload service-account auth secrets to Key Vault.

validations.message: You must have Contributor (or Owner) on the target subscription / RG.

location.label: Connector region
location.toolTip: Region for connector resources (Function App, KV, Storage, App Insights). Can differ from the workspace region.

basics.name: projectPrefix
basics.label: Project prefix
basics.toolTip: 3-12 lowercase alphanumeric. Used as the prefix for all created resource names.

basics.name: env
basics.label: Environment
basics.toolTip: Environment tag used in resource names.

options.text: Before deploying, create a dedicated read-only Entra service account with `Security Reader` + `Defender XDR Analyst` roles. You will paste its UPN below and upload its credentials to Key Vault AFTER deploy. Never use a privileged or human account.

subLabel.preValidation: Point the connector at your existing Sentinel workspace

options.text: An existing Sentinel-enabled Log Analytics workspace is REQUIRED. This template does not create or modify the workspace itself — it only adds 54 custom tables + a Data Connector UI card to it. The workspace can be in any RG of any subscription in this tenant.

elements.name: existingWorkspaceId
elements.label: Workspace resource ID
elements.toolTip: Full ARM resource ID of the existing Sentinel-enabled Log Analytics workspace. Copy from the workspace Overview → JSON view → id.

elements.name: workspaceLocation
elements.label: Workspace region
elements.toolTip: The Azure region where your existing workspace lives. DCE and DCR MUST be created in this region (Azure Monitor regional constraint). Find it via the workspace Overview → Location.

subLabel.preValidation: How the connector signs into security.microsoft.com

elements.name: serviceAccountUpn
elements.label: Service account UPN
elements.toolTip: UPN of the dedicated read-only Entra service account. e.g. svc-xdrlr@contoso.onmicrosoft.com

elements.name: authMethod
elements.label: Auth method
elements.toolTip: Both methods are unattended and auto-refreshing. Passkey is stronger against modern Conditional Access policies.

options.text: Auth secrets are NOT uploaded by this deployment. After the ARM deploy completes, run ./tools/Initialize-XdrLogRaiderAuth.ps1 -KeyVaultName <name> from the cloned repo (the deployment Output contains the exact command). Self-test fires within 5 minutes; check MDE_AuthTestResult_CL.

elements.name: functionPlanSku
elements.label: Function App plan
elements.toolTip: Consumption (Y1) is recommended — fits within Azure Functions free tier for typical workload.

elements.name: functionAppZipVersion
elements.label: Function App version
elements.toolTip: 'latest' pulls the newest GitHub Release; or pin a specific version like 1.0.0.

elements.name: githubRepo
elements.label: GitHub repo (owner/name)
elements.toolTip: Only override if you forked. Used to build the Function App code ZIP URL.
